subcodes.first_line: The Divine Day is manifest, and the Tongue of the All-Bountiful speaketh with the Most Exalted Word. Ponder thou upon the grace and mercy of God, O Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم الهی ظاهر و لسان صمدانی بکلمه علیا ناطق تفکر در فضل و رحمت الهی نما کلمه
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @wisdom [hikmat], @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
